modules.module_title: Introduction to Hair Extensions & Client Consultation
Types of Hair Extensions & Hair Selection

questions.question: Hair extension lagane se pehle client se kya discuss karna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Client ki hair history aur lifestyle

questions.explanation: Client ki hair history aur lifestyle discuss karna zaroori hai taaki sahi extension type aur maintenance plan suggest kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Patch test perform karna kyun important hai hair extension application se pehle?

options.A: Taaki client ko extra charge kar saken
options.B: Allergic reactions check karne ke liye
options.C: Extension kitna lamba hoga decide karne ke liye
options.D: Client ke hair type ko analyse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test allergic reactions ko identify karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, especially bonding agents ke liye.

questions.question: Client consultation mein aapko kya assess karna chahiye client ke natural hair ka?

options.B: Hair density, texture, aur condition
options.C: Hair ka volume, length aur price

questions.explanation: Client ke natural hair ki density, texture, aur condition assess karna zaroori hai taaki appropriate extension type aur weight choose kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Hair extensions lagane ka primary reason kya hota hai?

options.B: Hair ko temporary color karne ke liye
options.C: Hair mein length, volume ya dono add karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko damage se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Hair extensions ka primary purpose hair mein length, volume, ya dono add karna hota hai.

questions.question: Client ki expectations ko manage karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taaki client ko jyada products bech saken
options.B: Realistic results set karne aur client dissatisfaction se bachne ke liye
options.C: Apni services ki prices badhane ke liye
options.D: Client ko jaldi salon se bhej dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ki expectations ko manage karna zaroori hai taaki unhe realistic results ke baare mein inform kiya ja sake aur baad mein hone wali dissatisfaction se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hair extension application se pehle client ke hair ko kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Deep conditioning karke
options.C: Achhe se shampoo aur dry karke, koi product na lagakar

questions.explanation: Extensions lagane se pehle hair ko achhe se shampoo aur dry karna chahiye, aur koi styling product nahi lagana chahiye taaki bonding strong ho.

questions.question: Agar client ka scalp sensitive ho, toh kaunsa extension method avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Tape-in extensions

questions.explanation: Sensitive scalp wale clients ke liye hot fusion extensions avoid karne chahiye kyunki heat aur adhesive irritation cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Consultation ke dauran client se unki hair care routine ke baare mein poochhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ki personal life janne ke liye
options.B: Extension ke maintenance level ko match karne ke liye
options.C: Unhe naye products recommend karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ki hair care routine janne se aap unke liye aisa extension method choose kar sakte hain jo unki daily routine ke saath easily maintain ho sake.

questions.question: Hair extension application ke liye minimum natural hair length kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: 3-4 inches

questions.explanation: Generally, hair extensions lagane ke liye natural hair ki minimum length 3-4 inches honi chahiye taaki extensions properly blend ho saken aur natural look dein.

questions.question: Client ko hair extension ke potential risks aur side effects ke baare mein inform karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.A: Nahi, client ko darana nahi chahiye
options.B: Haan, informed consent ke liye zaroori hai
options.D: Sirf agar koi serious problem ho

questions.explanation: Client ko potential risks (jaise pulling, allergic reaction) aur side effects ke baare mein inform karna professional ethics aur informed consent ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka natural hair bahut fine (patla) hai, toh kaunsa extension type sabse suitable hoga?

options.B: Large micro rings

questions.explanation: Fine hair ke liye lightweight options jaise tape-ins ya micro links best hote hain, jo natural hair par kam stress dalte hain.

questions.question: Client consultation form mein kaunsi information record karna important hai?

options.B: Client ki contact details, hair history, allergies aur desired look

questions.explanation: Client ki contact details, hair history, allergies aur desired look record karna future reference aur professional service ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Hair extension selection mein 'color matching' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf client ki pasand ke liye
options.B: Extensions ko natural hair ke saath seamlessly blend karne ke liye
options.C: Extensions ko jyada expensive banane ke liye
options.D: Client ko naya look dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Perfect color matching zaroori hai taaki extensions natural hair ke saath smoothly blend ho saken aur detect na hon.

questions.question: Client ko home care instructions kab deni chahiye?

options.B: Application ke turant baad

questions.explanation: Home care instructions application ke turant baad deni chahiye taaki client ko pata chale ki extensions ko kaise maintain karna hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions lagane se pehle client ke hair ko trim karna kyun zaroori ho sakta hai?

options.A: Taaki extensions aur natural hair achhe se blend ho saken
options.B: Natural hair ko chhota karne ke liye
options.D: Extensions ka weight kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Extensions aur natural hair ki blending ko enhance karne ke liye aur split ends remove karne ke liye light trim zaroori ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko scalp conditions (jaise psoriasis, severe dandruff) hain, toh hair extensions lagana chahiye ya nahi?

options.B: Nahi, aise cases mein extensions avoid karne chahiye
options.C: Sirf tab jab client insist kare
options.D: Sirf light extensions laga sakte hain

questions.explanation: Scalp conditions wale clients ke liye extensions avoid karne chahiye kyunki yeh conditions ko exacerbate kar sakte hain aur discomfort create kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Hair extensions lagane ke baad client ko kitne time baad follow-up appointment ke liye bulana chahiye?

options.B: 1-2 weeks ke andar

questions.explanation: 1-2 weeks ke andar follow-up appointment zaroori hai taaki extensions ki fit, comfort aur client ki satisfaction check ki ja sake.

questions.question: Virgin hair extensions ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Hair jo kabhi process nahi hua ho (dyed, permed, bleached)
options.D: Hair jo salon se kharida ho

questions.explanation: Virgin hair extensions woh hote hain jinhe kabhi chemically process nahi kiya gaya ho, jaise dye, perm, ya bleach.

questions.question: Remy hair ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Iske cuticles ek hi direction mein aligned hote hain

questions.explanation: Remy hair mein cuticles ek hi direction mein aligned hote hain, jo tangling ko prevent karta hai aur hair ko smooth rakhta hai.

questions.question: Synthetic hair extensions ka ek disadvantage kya hai?

options.B: Yeh heat styling tolerate nahi karte

questions.explanation: Synthetic hair extensions generally heat styling tolerate nahi karte aur melt ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Tape-in extensions ka main benefit kya hai?

options.B: Yeh quick application aur removal provide karte hain
options.D: Yeh sirf short hair ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Tape-in extensions apni quick application aur relatively easy removal ke liye jaane jaate hain.

questions.question: Micro link (micro ring) extensions kis cheez se attach hote hain?

options.B: Adhesive se
options.C: Small metal rings ya beads se

questions.explanation: Micro link extensions mein small metal rings ya beads ka use hota hai jo natural hair aur extension strand ko secure karte hain.

questions.question: Weft extensions ko natural hair mein kaise attach kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Clips se

questions.explanation: Weft extensions (ya sew-in extensions) mein natural hair ko cornrows mein braid kiya jaata hai aur phir weft ko braids par sew kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar client daily styling aur heat use karta hai, toh kaunse hair extensions best honge?

options.B: Human hair

questions.explanation: Human hair extensions heat styling tools ko tolerate kar sakte hain aur natural hair ki tarah style kiye ja sakte hain, unlike synthetic hair.

questions.question: Hair extension ki quality ko kaise identify kar sakte hain?

options.B: Texture, shine, aur tangling tendency se

questions.explanation: Quality hair extensions ki pehchan unki smooth texture, natural shine, aur minimal tangling se hoti hai.

questions.question: Clip-in extensions ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Yeh daily lagaye aur utare ja sakte hain
options.D: Yeh swimming ke liye best hain

questions.explanation: Clip-in extensions ka sabse bada fayda yeh hai ki inhein daily convenience ke liye lagaya aur utara ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Nano ring extensions, micro ring extensions se kaise alag hain?

options.B: Yeh hot fusion se lagte hain
options.C: Yeh significantly smaller rings use karte hain
options.D: Yeh sirf synthetic hair ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Nano ring extensions micro rings se bhi chhote hote hain, jo unhe aur bhi undetectable banate hain aur fine hair ke liye suitable hote hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko volume chahiye, length nahi, toh kaunsa extension type prefer kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Shorter, thicker wefts ya individual strands

questions.explanation: Volume add karne ke liye shorter, thicker wefts ya individual strands jo natural hair ki length ke kareeb hon, best hote hain.

questions.question: Hair extension ke liye 'density' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Hair ke strands ki thickness
options.C: Per square inch mein hair strands ki quantity

questions.explanation: Hair density refers to the number of hair strands per square inch on the scalp, jo extension selection ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Bundles, wefts aur individual strands mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Bundles loose hair hote hain, wefts attached strands, individual strands single units
options.C: Bundles sirf curly hair ke liye hain
options.D: Wefts sirf short hair ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Bundles loose hair ke collections hote hain, wefts ek seam par attached strands hote hain, aur individual strands single, pre-bonded units hote hain.

questions.question: Konse hair extension method mein heat ka use hota hai?

options.B: Cold fusion

questions.explanation: Hot fusion method mein keratin bonds ko melt karne ke liye heat ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair thin aur fragile hai, toh kaunsa method least damaging hoga?

options.B: Heavy hot fusion

questions.explanation: Thin aur fragile hair ke liye clip-ins ya extremely lightweight tape-ins sabse kam damaging hote hain, kyunki inmein natural hair par kam tension padti hai.

questions.question: Hair extension ka length measurement kis unit mein hota hai?

options.B: Inches

questions.explanation: Hair extensions ki length generally inches mein measure ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Konse type ke hair extensions ko 'skin weft' bhi kehte hain?

options.B: Tape-in

questions.explanation: Tape-in extensions ko kabhi-kabhi 'skin weft' bhi kaha jaata hai kyunki unki thin, flat base scalp par 'skin' ki tarah lie karti hai aur undetectable hoti hai.

questions.question: Hot fusion method mein kaunsa bonding agent use hota hai?

options.B: Keratin

questions.explanation: Hot fusion method mein keratin-based bonds use hote hain jinhe heat se melt karke natural hair se attach kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Micro ring extensions lagate waqt natural hair aur extension strand ko secure karne ke liye kya tool use hota hai?

options.B: Pliers

questions.explanation: Micro ring extensions ko secure karne ke liye special pliers ka use hota hai jo ring ko clamp karte hain.

questions.question: Tape-in extensions lagane ke baad, bonding ko strong karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Heat press karna
options.C: 48-72 ghante tak hair wash na karna
options.D: Hair ko tight ponytail mein bandhna

questions.explanation: Tape-in extensions lagane ke baad, bonding ko fully set hone ke liye 48-72 ghante tak hair wash avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Cold fusion method mein heat ka use hota hai ya nahi?

options.B: Nahi, ultrasonic waves ya adhesive use hota hai

questions.explanation: Cold fusion method mein heat ka use nahi hota, balki ultrasonic waves ya special adhesives se bonds banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Weave (sew-in) extensions mein, natural hair ko scalp par kaise prepare kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Small sections mein braid karke (cornrows)

questions.explanation: Weave extensions mein, natural hair ko cornrows mein braid kiya jaata hai jo wefts ko sew karne ke liye ek base provide karte hain.

questions.question: Hair sectioning kyun important hai hair extension application ke dauran?

options.A: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.B: Clean aur even application ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko uncomfortable karne ke liye
options.D: Jyada extensions use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper sectioning se clean, even aur well-blended application ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Hot fusion extensions lagate waqt, bonding tool ko kitni der tak hair par apply karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab tak bond melt na ho jaaye aur achhe se seal na ho jaaye
options.B: Sirf 1 second ke liye
options.D: Jab tak client ko garmi na lage

questions.explanation: Bonding tool ko tab tak apply karna chahiye jab tak keratin bond completely melt na ho jaaye aur natural hair ke around achhe se seal na ho jaaye.

questions.question: Agar micro rings bahut tight laga diye jaaye toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Hair extensions jyada time tak chalenge
options.B: Scalp mein discomfort, pain aur hair breakage ho sakta hai
options.C: Extensions natural hair se jaldi detach ho jayenge

questions.explanation: Bahut tight micro rings scalp mein discomfort, pain aur natural hair par excessive tension ke karan breakage cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Tape-in extensions ko natural hair se kitni distance par lagana chahiye scalp se?

options.B: 0.5-1 cm scalp se door

questions.explanation: Tape-in extensions ko scalp se approximately 0.5-1 cm ki distance par lagana chahiye taaki natural movement ho sake aur scalp irritation na ho.

questions.question: Application ke dauran, extensions ko 'brick-lay' pattern mein lagana kyun beneficial hai?

options.B: Natural look aur even weight distribution ke liye
options.D: Zyada product use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Brick-lay pattern extensions ko natural look deta hai, wefts ya bonds ko overlap hone se rokta hai aur weight ko evenly distribute karta hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions lagate waqt, kitne natural hair strands ko ek extension strand se attach karna chahiye?

options.B: Extension strand ke weight ke according appropriate amount

questions.explanation: Natural hair strands ki quantity extension strand ke weight ke according honi chahiye taaki excessive tension ya slippage na ho.

questions.question: Konse bonding method mein heat aur chemicals dono ka minimal use hota hai?

options.B: Cold fusion

questions.explanation: Micro rings mein na heat ka use hota hai aur na hi chemical adhesives ka, isliye yeh least damaging methods mein se ek hai.

questions.question: Hair extension application se pehle hair wash karte waqt, kaunse products avoid karne chahiye?

options.B: Deep conditioners aur oily products

questions.explanation: Deep conditioners aur oily products residues chhod sakte hain jo bonding ko weaken kar sakte hain. Hair clean aur product-free hona chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ka hair thin ho, toh konsa weft attachment method use karna chahiye?

options.B: Micro-wefts ya very fine braids

questions.explanation: Thin hair ke liye micro-wefts ya bahut fine braids ka use karna chahiye taaki natural hair par kam tension pade aur extensions undetectable rahen.

questions.question: Bonding application ke baad, extensions ko final cut aur style karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf client ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Natural hair ke saath seamlessly blend karne aur desired look achieve karne ke liye
options.C: Extensions ko chhota karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Final cut aur style extensions ko natural hair ke saath blend karta hai aur client ke desired look ko achieve karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Hair extension lagate waqt, technician ko consistently client ki comfort level check karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.A: Nahi, sirf kaam par focus karna chahiye
options.B: Haan, taaki koi discomfort ya pain na ho

questions.explanation: Client ki comfort level ko regularly check karna zaroori hai taaki koi discomfort, pain ya tension na ho, jo long-term damage ka karan ban sakti hai.

questions.question: Attachment point par excessive tension se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Traction alopecia (hair loss) ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Excessive tension se natural hair follicles par stress padta hai, jiske karan traction alopecia aur permanent hair loss ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko wash karte waqt kaunsa shampoo use karna chahiye?

options.B: Sulphate-free aur paraben-free shampoo

questions.explanation: Sulphate-free aur paraben-free shampoos bonds ko preserve karte hain aur extensions ki longevity badhate hain.

questions.question: Raat ko sone se pehle hair extensions ko kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Tight ponytail mein bandhna chahiye
options.C: Loose braid ya ponytail mein bandhna chahiye taaki tangling na ho

questions.explanation: Raat ko sone se pehle loose braid ya ponytail mein bandhne se tangling aur matting avoid hota hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions mein conditioner kaise apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf roots par
options.C: Mid-lengths se tips tak, bonds par avoid karte hue

questions.explanation: Conditioner ko mid-lengths se tips tak apply karna chahiye aur bonds par avoid karna chahiye taaki bonds slippery na hon aur detach na hon.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko blow-dry karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Bonds par direct heat avoid karna

questions.explanation: Bonds par direct heat avoid karna chahiye, especially hot fusion extensions mein, kyunki yeh bonds ko melt kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko kitne time baad professional maintenance ke liye le jaana chahiye?

options.B: Har 6-8 weeks

questions.explanation: Professional maintenance har 6-8 weeks mein zaroori hai taaki bonds ko check kiya ja sake aur extensions ko adjust kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko remove karte waqt kya tool use hota hai hot fusion extensions ke liye?

options.B: Bond remover solution aur pliers

questions.explanation: Hot fusion extensions ko remove karne ke liye bond remover solution aur special pliers ka use hota hai jo bonds ko break karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client swimming kar raha ho, toh hair extensions ko kaise protect karna chahiye?

options.A: Swimming cap pehen kar ya braid karke
options.B: Loose chhod kar
options.D: Sirf fresh water mein swim karke

questions.explanation: Swimming cap pehenne se ya hair ko braid karne se extensions chlorine ya salt water ke damaging effects se bachate hain.

questions.question: Hair extensions mein kaunsa brush use karna chahiye?

options.B: Bristle brush

questions.explanation: Loop brush ya wide-tooth comb extensions aur bonds par gentle hote hain, tangling ko prevent karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ke extensions mat ho gaye hain, toh unhe kaise detangle karna chahiye?

options.B: Conditioner laga kar aur fingers se gently detangle karke

questions.explanation: Matting ko conditioner ki help se aur fingers se gently detangle karna chahiye, roots se door rehte hue.

questions.question: Tape-in extensions ko remove karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Oil-based remover solution

questions.explanation: Tape-in extensions ko remove karne ke liye specially formulated oil-based remover solutions use hote hain jo adhesive ko dissolve karte hain.

questions.question: Extensions removal ke baad natural hair ki proper aftercare kyun important hai?

options.B: Natural hair ko cleanse, condition aur strengthen karne ke liye
options.C: Naye extensions jaldi lagane ke liye
options.D: Client ko jyada products bechne ke liye

questions.explanation: Removal ke baad natural hair ko cleanse, deep condition aur strengthen karna zaroori hai taaki hair health maintain rahe.

questions.question: Agar client ko extension lagane ke baad itching ho rahi ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Client ko scalp oil suggest karna chahiye
options.C: Scalp ko check karna aur professional advice dena
options.D: Extensions turant remove kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Itching irritation ya allergic reaction ka sign ho sakti hai. Scalp check karna aur professional advice dena (ya doctor ko refer karna) zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko kitne time tak pehenna advisable hai generally?

options.B: 2-4 months, depending on growth and method

questions.explanation: Hair extensions ko generally 2-4 months tak pehenna advisable hai, uske baad natural hair growth aur bond integrity ke karan maintenance ya removal zaroori ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko heat protectant spray use karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.B: Haan, heat styling se pehle zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Human hair extensions ko heat styling se pehle heat protectant spray use karna chahiye taaki damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar client ke natural hair mein excessive shedding ho rahi ho extensions ke saath, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Extensions remove karke natural hair ki condition check karna
options.C: Client ko naye extensions suggest karna

questions.explanation: Excessive shedding serious issue ho sakti hai. Extensions remove karke underlying cause ko investigate karna aur natural hair ki health check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Extensions ko remove karte waqt, natural hair ko minimum damage ho, iske liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper remover solution aur gentle technique use karna

questions.explanation: Proper remover solution aur gentle technique ka use karne se natural hair ko damage se bachaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Aftercare instructions mein client ko kaunsi activity avoid karne ko bolna chahiye?

options.B: Tight ponytails ya buns

questions.explanation: Tight ponytails ya buns se bonds par excessive tension padti hai, jisse breakage ya slippage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein hygiene maintain karne ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Tools ko regularly sterilize aur sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Tools ko regularly sterilize aur sanitize karna infections ko prevent karne ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Hair extension technician ko personal hygiene mein kya shamil karna chahiye?

options.B: Clean uniform, tied hair, aur washed hands

questions.explanation: Clean uniform, tied hair, aur washed hands basic personal hygiene ke essentials hain jo professional image banate hain aur contamination rokte hain.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko kaise roka ja sakta hai?

options.A: Ek hi towel sab clients ke liye use karke
options.B: Disposable items ka use karke aur reusable tools ko sterilize karke
options.C: Tools ko sirf water se rinse karke

questions.explanation: Disposable items ka use aur reusable tools ki proper sterilization cross-contamination ko effective tarike se rokti hai.

questions.question: Client ki privacy aur confidentiality maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Client trust aur professional ethics ke liye
options.D: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ki privacy aur confidentiality maintain karna unke trust ko banaye rakhne aur professional ethics ko uphold karne ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko application ke dauran discomfort ya pain feel ho, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Application rok kar reason investigate karna chahiye
options.C: Jyada speed se kaam karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client discomfort ya pain ko immediately address karna chahiye taaki koi potential damage ya injury roki ja sake.

questions.question: Sharp tools (jaise scissors, pliers) ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Sterilized aur secure container mein
options.D: Jahan se koi bhi le sake

questions.explanation: Sharp tools ko sterilized aur secure container mein store karna chahiye taaki safety maintain rahe aur tools ki sharpness bani rahe.

questions.question: Salon mein proper ventilation kyun important hai?

options.B: Chemical fumes aur dust ko clear karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes aur dust ko clear karta hai, jo technician aur client dono ki health ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Emergency situation (jaise fire, injury) mein technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency protocols follow karna aur help call karna

questions.explanation: Emergency protocols ko follow karna aur immediate help call karna critical hai kisi bhi emergency situation mein.

questions.question: Client ko realistic results ke baare mein inform karna kaunse professional ethics mein aata hai?

options.B: Honesty aur Transparency

questions.explanation: Client ko realistic results ke baare mein inform karna honesty aur transparency ke professional ethics ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Hair extension products ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Cool, dry place mein, direct sunlight se door

questions.explanation: Hair extension products ko cool, dry place mein, direct sunlight se door store karna chahiye taaki unki quality maintain rahe.

questions.question: Agar client ko extension lagane ke baad koi problem ho, toh technician ko kaise respond karna chahiye?

options.B: Professionally sunna, solution offer karna aur follow-up lena

questions.explanation: Client ki complaints ko professionally sunna, solution offer karna aur follow-up lena customer satisfaction aur trust ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Technician ko regular training aur skill development mein invest karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf naye trends seekhne ke liye
options.B: Industry standards ko meet karne aur apni skills ko improve karne ke liye
options.D: Apne competitors se aage rehne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular training aur skill development se technician latest techniques aur industry standards se updated rehta hai, jisse quality service provide hoti hai.

questions.question: Client ke hair aur scalp ka proper examination kyun zaroori hai safety ke point of view se?

options.A: Sirf hair color match karne ke liye
options.B: Underlying scalp conditions ya hair damage ko identify karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko uncomfortable karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper examination se potential scalp conditions ya hair damage ko identify kiya ja sakta hai, jo extensions lagane ke liye unsuitable ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Used blades, needles (agar koi ho) ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Sharps container mein

questions.explanation: Used blades aur needles ko sharps container mein dispose karna chahiye taaki injuries aur infections se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Professional boundaries maintain karna kyun important hai client ke saath?

options.A: Client ko door rakhne ke liye
options.B: Professionalism aur respect maintain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional boundaries maintain karne se client-technician relationship mein professionalism aur mutual respect bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar technician ko khud koi infectious skin condition ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab tak condition theek na ho jaaye, tab tak kaam se break lena chahiye
options.C: Sirf gloves pehen kar kaam karna chahiye
options.D: Client ko inform nahi karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Infectious skin condition hone par, technician ko tab tak kaam se break lena chahiye jab tak condition theek na ho jaaye, taaki clients mein infection na phail sake.

questions.question: Agar client ke extensions slip ho rahe hon, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Bonds improperly applied the ya oily products use kiye gaye the
options.C: Client ne bahut zyada brushing ki

questions.explanation: Improper application, weak bonds, ya oily hair products ka use slippage ka common reason ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hair extension business mein client retention ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Excellent service, communication aur follow-up

questions.explanation: Excellent service, clear communication aur regular follow-up client retention ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko extensions ke baad scalp irritation ho, toh kya troubleshoot karna chahiye?

options.B: Attachment points ki tension check karna aur allergic reaction ke liye assess karna
options.C: Client ko aur extensions lagane ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Scalp irritation ke liye attachment points ki tension check karna aur potential allergic reaction ke liye assess karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Marketing ke liye social media ka use kaise kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Before/after photos, client testimonials aur informative content share karke

questions.explanation: Before/after photos, client testimonials aur informative content social media par share karna business growth ke liye effective hai.

questions.question: Agar extensions dry aur brittle ho rahe hon, toh kya solution hai?

options.B: Deep conditioning treatments aur hydrating products use karna

questions.explanation: Dry aur brittle extensions ko deep conditioning treatments aur hydrating products se revive kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Pricing strategy set karte waqt kin factors ko consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Cost of materials, time spent, skill level aur market demand

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy set karte waqt cost of materials, time spent, technician ka skill level aur market demand jaise factors ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Advanced hair extension techniques mein kya shamil ho sakta hai?

options.B: Color blending, custom cutting aur multi-method applications

questions.explanation: Advanced techniques mein complex color blending, custom cutting for seamless integration aur multi-method applications shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Client testimonials aur reviews kyun important hain business ke liye?

options.B: Credibility build karne aur naye clients attract karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client testimonials aur reviews business ki credibility build karte hain aur potential clients ko attract karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ke natural hair mein breakage ho rahi ho extensions ke area mein, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Excessive tension, improper application ya poor aftercare
options.C: Client ne bahut kam brush kiya

questions.explanation: Hair breakage ka reason excessive tension, improper application, poor aftercare, ya wrong extension method ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek successful hair extension technician ki kya qualities honi chahiye?

options.B: Technical skill, client communication, professionalism aur creativity

questions.explanation: Successful technician ke paas technical skill, strong client communication, professionalism aur creativity ka blend hona chahiye.

questions.question: Inventory management kyun important hai hair extension business mein?

options.A: Sirf products ko count karne ke liye
options.B: Stock levels maintain karne, wastage rokne aur profitability improve karne ke liye
options.C: Clients ko confuse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective inventory management se stock levels maintain rehte hain, wastage kam hoti hai aur business ki profitability improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar client ke extensions mat ho rahe hon, toh kya advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Regular brushing, proper washing technique aur anti-tangle products use karna

questions.explanation: Matting se bachne ke liye regular brushing, proper washing technique aur anti-tangle products ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Referral program business growth mein kaise help karta hai?

options.A: Sirf existing clients ko reward karta hai
options.B: Word-of-mouth marketing ko encourage karta hai aur naye clients laata hai

questions.explanation: Referral programs existing clients ko naye clients refer karne ke liye encourage karte hain, jo word-of-mouth marketing ke through business growth karta hai.

questions.question: Hair extension business mein 'upselling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Clients ko high-end services ya related products suggest karna

questions.explanation: Upselling ka matlab hai clients ko unki current purchase se related high-end services ya products suggest karna, jo unki overall experience ko enhance kare.

questions.question: Agar client ki expectation unrealistic ho, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Client ki baat maan leni chahiye
options.B: Professionally educate karna aur realistic alternatives suggest karna
options.C: Client ko service deny kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Unrealistic expectations ko professionally address karna aur client ko educate karke realistic alternatives suggest karna trust build karta hai aur dissatisfaction se bachata hai.

questions.question: Online presence (website, social media) kyun important hai aaj ke time mein hair extension technicians ke liye?

options.B: Visibility badhane, naye clients tak pahunchne aur portfolio showcase karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf friends se connect hone ke liye

questions.explanation: Online presence visibility badhati hai, naye clients tak pahunchne mein madad karti hai aur ek effective platform provide karti hai apne kaam ka portfolio showcase karne ke liye.
